plain_language: Customer is on credit hold and the quote exceeds the open A/R threshold
remediation: Request a Finance review or downscale phase 1 commitment to fit the credit window

plain_language: Multi-year discount is missing on a subscription line
remediation: Apply the standard 3-yr discount (rate card row D-12) or split into single-year terms

plain_language: Cross-product dependency unresolved (license without companion service)
remediation: Add an Implementation Service line so the license has a performance obligation

plain_language: Phase-1 footprint exceeds the 12-month bookable window
Pricing override exceeds discount-approval limit for AE tier
remediation: Request RVP discount approval or restore list price

plain_language: Customer region requires a security review for this product family
remediation: Open the security gate ticket before submit
